zh.Melling, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾梅林
zh.Clayton, Yorkshire,England: 英國英格蘭越可爾克雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Byron於大約1210年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓時，他的父親Robert de Byron34歲，母親Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton37歲。他和Maud de Clayton至少有2個兒子。他去世於1280年在英國藍卡爾梅林享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Byron于大约1210年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓时，他的父亲Robert de Byron34岁，母亲Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton37岁。他和Maud de Clayton至少有2个儿子。他去世于1280年在英国藍卡爾梅林享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Byron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Byram (Yorkshire), named with Old English bȳrum ‘at the cattle sheds’, dative plural of bȳre ‘byre’. This name has occasionally been adopted as a Jewish surname, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Byron was born about 1210, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert de Byron, was 34 and his mother, Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton, was 37. He had at least 2 sons with Maud de Clayton. He died in 1280, in Melling, Lancashire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Byron est né environ 1210, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Byron, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Maud de Clayton. Il est décédé en 1280, à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Byron um 1210 in Clayton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Byron 34 und seine Mutter Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton 37. Er hatte mit Maud de Clayton mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1280 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Melling, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Byron è nato il circa 1210 nel Clayton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Byron, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Maud de Clayton. Morì nel 1280, nel Melling, Lancashire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Byronが約1210年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Byronは34歳，母Cecilia  Cecelia Claytonは37歳であった。彼はMaud de Claytonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1280年にイギリスランカシュアイアメリングで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Byron(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Byron(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Maud de Clayton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 영국 랭카실르 멜링에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Byron nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Byron, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Maud de Clayton. Ele faleceu em 1280, em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Byron родился около 1210 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Byron было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton, 37. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Maud de Clayton. Он умер в 1280 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Byron nació aproximadamente 1210, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Byron, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Cecilia  Cecelia Clayton, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Maud de Clayton. Murió en 1280, en Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
